name: Greg Stanton
subject: Join me in supporting Jon Ossoff for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Friend,

Today is the day of Georgia's Senate run-off elections. Jon Ossoff has the chance to unseat Republican David Perdue, and if he does, the Democrats are that much closer to ensuring Joe Biden has a legislative majority in Congress. If not, it may mean more partisan gridlock from Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell. [**Will you join me in helping push Jon over the finish line so President Biden can hit the ground running on January 20th?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/E1MTaAh81OBBt81PkOymZkrxmw87j1Uklp5NoCPsaEU=/n2ayho8nT6S1K4I7nnmaMz9-H_kHBknERcgxmAuksRE=?refcode=X_121120_StantonOssoff_A)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/E1MTaAh81OBBt81PkOymZkrxmw87j1Uklp5NoCPsaEU=/IGHieB91mNZwP3sD71K_9z8Q4LK4HolXkOOMnPCRSmw=?refcode=X_121120_StantonOssoff_A)

Jon is who Georgia needs representing them in Washington, and as a Senator he will help our nation address everything from COVID-19 pandemic relief to climate change. I cannot thank you enough for your continued support here in Arizona and for races across the country.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/E1MTaAh81OBBt81PkOymZkrxmw87j1Uklp5NoCPsaEU=/n2ayho8nT6S1K4I7nnmaMz9-H_kHBknERcgxmAuksRE=?refcode=X_121120_StantonOssoff_A)

Thank you,
_\--Greg_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress
---
Stanton for Congress
4340 E Indian School Rd.
Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/E1MTaAh81OBBt81PkOymZkrxmw87j1Uklp5NoCPsaEU=/76Bl2auZKRWRjkstDl9kve06dA5lVGpCN0YVQRtJrMQ=).

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: So it begins...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Congressman Fitzgerald votes AGAINST Pelosi No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-e-xduuldd-ahkdjtlkr-u/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xduuldd-ahkdjtlkr-r/) PeterYesterday, I was sworn in as the Representative for Wisconsin's 5th Congressional District.And just like I promised, one of my very first official actions was to vote AGAINST giving Nancy Pelosi - _and "The Squad" in power behind the scenes_ - more ways to fail America. [Fight Pelosi, Fight The Squad - $10](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xduuldd-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [Fight Pelosi, Fight The Squad - $25](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xduuldd-ahkdjtlkr-j/) [Fight Pelosi, Fight The Squad - $100](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xduuldd-ahkdjtlkr-t/) I voted AGAINST silencing the voice of millions of Americans in an unprecedented way. I voted AGAINST stifling free speech from elected members of Congress. And I voted AGAINST laying the groundwork for Democrats' costly socialist policies.This is a critical moment.Last year, when the American people needed them most, Pelosi and The Squad pushed their anti-Trump-obsessed impeachment charge and their socialist, anti-freedom agenda.This year, the Democrats doubled down on that failure, rewarding Nancy Pelosi with another term.I strongly objected, _**just like I promised the people of Wisconsin I would. **_Please, [take a moment to join me in this critical fight](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xduuldd-ahkdjtlkr-i/). There's much more yet to come.Thanks,\- Congressman Scott Fitzgerald

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: A new year and a new beginning
body:
Peter,

Happy New Year!

I hope the holiday season was peaceful and filled with happiness for you and your loved ones. However, it is impossible to ignore the unbearable toll of this year on so many. As the page turns on 2020 and a new chapter awaits us, we can take solace in starting the new year off better than we finished the last. There are plenty of things to be hopeful about going into 2021. The election of a new president bodes well for our hopes of government action in the midst of our current crises. The release of a vaccine shows promise for our country as we continue to fight COVID-19. We can now look forward to global cooperation and action in the face of humanity’s most pressing concerns.

There is much promise going into 2021 and it is important for us to internalize the hope that things can and will be better. As we reflect on this past year, it’s vital that we do so looking forward to a new beginning. In order to achieve this new beginning we will need action. Yet, while it is action that gets things done, it is hope that keeps us focused on our goals. 2021 can be the start of something new and promising, so let’s work to make it happen.

In the days, weeks, and months ahead, I’ll be filling you in on the work I’ll be doing to continue to support our community and beyond.

I wish everyone the best going into 2021. May it be a year filled with happiness, action, and progress.

With gratitude,
Adem

Brooklyn NY 11213-0427 United States

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Today is ELECTION DAY, Georgia!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa301/34a064cc/1d7e11bf/7027a94/2094273296/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - Today is the day we've all been waiting for. ELECTION DAY is finally here! Today is the LAST day to vote in the runoff elections that will decide Georgia's next U.S. Senators and Public Service Commissioner, so if you have not cast your ballot, make sure you have a plan to get out and vote today! Join over 3 million of your fellow Georgians who have already made their voices heard this election. **Voting in person today?** Here's what you need to know:
* Polls are open from 7am to 7pm.
* You should vote at your assigned Election Day polling place. Your Election Day polling place likely differs from your early voting location options, so double check your Election Day polling place at [iwillvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa301/34a064cc/1d7e11bf/7027a95/2094273296/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/") or call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816.
* You must have [an acceptable form of identification](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa301/34a064cc/1d7e11bf/7027a92/2094273296/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://sos.ga.gov/index.php/elections/georgia_voter_identification_requirements2") with you when you vote.

**Requested a ballot but haven 't received it?** No problem! You can vote in person today. Just tell the person at the check-in table that you wish to cancel your requested mail ballot and vote in person instead. Go to [iwillvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa301/34a064cc/1d7e11bf/7027a95/2094273296/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/") to find your assigned polling place. **Already received your mail ballot but haven 't returned it?** DO NOT WAIT. Turn in your ballot right away. **Mail ballots must be in a drop box or received by your county elections office BEFORE 7pm today!** Follow the instructions on your mail ballot and complete it now; don't forget to sign the oath on the back of the envelope. When you're done, visit [iwillvote.com/locate](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa301/34a064cc/1d7e11bf/7027a93/2094273296/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/locate") to find a drop box location in your county (most counties have them). You can also return your ballot directly to your county elections office if your county does not have a drop box available. Return your ballot directly; do not put it in the mail. Once you return your ballot, go to [georgia.ballottrax.net/voter](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa301/34a064cc/1d7e11bf/7027a90/2094273296/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://georgia.ballottrax.net/voter/") to make sure your ballot is received! It's been a long election season in Georgia and we're ready to shape our future. Grab a friend, head to the polls or a drop box, and help write history. For more information on voting in Georgia, check out [peachvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa301/34a064cc/1d7e11bf/7027a91/2094273296/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.peachvote.com/"). Have questions or need help? Call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816. Happy voting! \- Team Fair Fight P.S. Your voting experience matters. Fair Fight is documenting voters' stories to help in our fight for free and fair elections. Share your voting experience [here](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa301/34a064cc/1d7e11bf/7027a9e/2094273296/VEsO/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSesRsAhJ9dBbyXI-sWwQJ2MiLWM3co9vyXSzCK0aMvvxBVu8g/viewform"). |
---|---|---

Peter,
On behalf of the TNDP staff, with warmth in our hearts, I would like to thank you for your consistent and steadfast support. If the end of year gifts we received are any indication of the enthusiasm and spirit of Tennessee Democrats, then we have a lot to look forward to! We've really had each other's backs and we are so thrilled with all that we accomplished together this past year.
With Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in the White House, multiple vaccines being rolled out, and hopefully flipping the Senate, I am feeling very good about 2021. We’ve already started rolling up our sleeves, getting ready for what’s next. So again, from all of us at the TNDP:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/THANK%20YOU%402x.png]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
--
Mary Mancini

name: Greg Stanton
subject: Let's go win back the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Friend,

[**The runoff elections are here, and now Georgia voters will go to the polls to ultimately decide who will control the Senate. Have you had a chance to chip in to help Rev. Warnock defeat Republican Kelly Loeffler?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8CgQW4kGf1vE0q2UjyFbAph6G0qXKwHIqCfXvMeybCk=/HwU7jO71GZIjkIAwMD_xn5PyrpCfxScSIhVbQgXVGRQ=?refcode=X_121020_StantonWarnock_B)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/8CgQW4kGf1vE0q2UjyFbAph6G0qXKwHIqCfXvMeybCk=/HwU7jO71GZIjkIAwMD_xn5PyrpCfxScSIhVbQgXVGRQ=?refcode=X_121020_StantonWarnock_B)

I am proud to support Rev. Raphael Warnock, because I believe he will do what is required to serve the needs of Georgians and Americans. There is too much at stake right now to allow Republicans like Kelly Loeffler and Mitch McConnell to impose partisan gridlock in the Senate; we need unity and cooperation so we can overcome this deadly pandemic and resume our lives.

**[Will you join me and chip in to help Rev. Warnock reach the Senate?](https://act.myngp.com/el/8CgQW4kGf1vE0q2UjyFbAph6G0qXKwHIqCfXvMeybCk=/HwU7jO71GZIjkIAwMD_xn5PyrpCfxScSIhVbQgXVGRQ=?refcode=X_121020_StantonWarnock_B)**

Thank you for your continued support in helping empower Democrats in Arizona and across America.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/8CgQW4kGf1vE0q2UjyFbAph6G0qXKwHIqCfXvMeybCk=/HwU7jO71GZIjkIAwMD_xn5PyrpCfxScSIhVbQgXVGRQ=?refcode=X_121020_StantonWarnock_B)

In solidarity,
_\--Greg_

body:
If we do nothing and let these shutdowns continue, thousands more businesses will close and thousands more Americans will lose their jobs -- just when they need them most.
****

.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001D_HiJcySkW-ujKbbqo7h_UNzk6JgA2hEmCcj6_p9NtxnFspSkumckFLZ9nwN7Xu9UfnSbawnSMldBIkow18kMGzku3Y2E6BvoLvWQYP6RHvjNllXa6XqxGOhz1rHre9k1JxKfbY2Fcn6JG5sfc00ZwU2l59muhcs7wrTGYBH0ISNYiTHCcBoI11DBTysmtZ3cJ6pVTerxihT5F24zO6VH49lbT0EpiGOYGL-SQwU0BK_R0rwtmHvJVod228a3i5GmPe4Pt8vquypzHRLSQz8WFAFuHNrX94wn3Kba1Pg45gQ73UuhaDxLbxUYtoAd68gKijkjgHmk7XU6pw4YzePaVQ2V1IPbC8QAOk5uElr9FXN2By2SkcvIC8a57Uq1HVp8j836_96SFpvD24_vRmNiB-u8RXpQ0pi&c=ZwtLrNbtiT1mCfsFxXYIuan7QCObLk3ODcko5z5Oy4PX6CipzJgXCw==&ch=rv_JOru-0Gd4N4j_Hjd5cTbt0BT9oyrdJzb0Vfaj3zA6fVy6rPOppw==) Friend, our small businesses are at a breaking point.

Across the nation, America's more than 30 million small businesses are on the edge of failure -- _if they haven 't closed their doors already. _The tens of millions of people our small businesses employ are very nearly out of a job -- _if they haven 't been furloughed already._ Our local economies are on the brink of collapse, because our small businesses are the backbone of our communities and, as it stands under these tyrannical statewide shutdowns, _they won 't survive._
[**STOP THE SHUTDOWN -- SIGN THE PETITION**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001D_HiJcySkW-ujKbbqo7h_UNzk6JgA2hEmCcj6_p9NtxnFspSkumckIeCwTDY1nZfTaNP0giodo-qfpMATr_KZ8UrnoBmnNihyYJiWmP3h1dmfei3VDo2aIqPJlCuHQKm2luCKndylP7eqI6bmV5OcRV1JvkZ1ZG7XNRfV5i1UC67aBsLDJfvq5BxSNmxnZJnxMukFRo-UnNeaUK9dRi3sy0QiVy3roZmvdb7qI2q_4loQo4KySulqb6u18QqnyvezsdanRfnw6rgsNBRttUBpg20u6q4j3JabJrXxdx01NqocI-TcI7dj02vC191LgUSJ9Iha0E7s3D2JNGY3gjAaH_va0WHNLHLcWZFVN4X8iwm8-mEO3lwZN3eMICkcD3MCSCCv7e1i55u2BF5ReQAooGsOWcRtbom&c=ZwtLrNbtiT1mCfsFxXYIuan7QCObLk3ODcko5z5Oy4PX6CipzJgXCw==&ch=rv_JOru-0Gd4N4j_Hjd5cTbt0BT9oyrdJzb0Vfaj3zA6fVy6rPOppw==)
We must fight back. Across the nation, Governors have forced statewide shutdowns that are compounding disaster. They've already cost thousands upon thousands of Americans their jobs, families their livelihoods, and small business owners their work.
[**SAVE SMALL BUSINESS -- SIGN THE PETITION**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001D_HiJcySkW-ujKbbqo7h_UNzk6JgA2hEmCcj6_p9NtxnFspSkumckIeCwTDY1nZfTaNP0giodo-qfpMATr_KZ8UrnoBmnNihyYJiWmP3h1dmfei3VDo2aIqPJlCuHQKm2luCKndylP7eqI6bmV5OcRV1JvkZ1ZG7XNRfV5i1UC67aBsLDJfvq5BxSNmxnZJnxMukFRo-UnNeaUK9dRi3sy0QiVy3roZmvdb7qI2q_4loQo4KySulqb6u18QqnyvezsdanRfnw6rgsNBRttUBpg20u6q4j3JabJrXxdx01NqocI-TcI7dj02vC191LgUSJ9Iha0E7s3D2JNGY3gjAaH_va0WHNLHLcWZFVN4X8iwm8-mEO3lwZN3eMICkcD3MCSCCv7e1i55u2BF5ReQAooGsOWcRtbom&c=ZwtLrNbtiT1mCfsFxXYIuan7QCObLk3ODcko5z5Oy4PX6CipzJgXCw==&ch=rv_JOru-0Gd4N4j_Hjd5cTbt0BT9oyrdJzb0Vfaj3zA6fVy6rPOppw==)
If we do nothing and let these shutdowns continue, thousands more businesses will close and thousands more Americans will lose their jobs -- just when they need them most.

[**Can we count on you to join the fight to stop the shutdown and save small businesses?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001D_HiJcySkW-ujKbbqo7h_UNzk6JgA2hEmCcj6_p9NtxnFspSkumckIeCwTDY1nZfTaNP0giodo-qfpMATr_KZ8UrnoBmnNihyYJiWmP3h1dmfei3VDo2aIqPJlCuHQKm2luCKndylP7eqI6bmV5OcRV1JvkZ1ZG7XNRfV5i1UC67aBsLDJfvq5BxSNmxnZJnxMukFRo-UnNeaUK9dRi3sy0QiVy3roZmvdb7qI2q_4loQo4KySulqb6u18QqnyvezsdanRfnw6rgsNBRttUBpg20u6q4j3JabJrXxdx01NqocI-TcI7dj02vC191LgUSJ9Iha0E7s3D2JNGY3gjAaH_va0WHNLHLcWZFVN4X8iwm8-mEO3lwZN3eMICkcD3MCSCCv7e1i55u2BF5ReQAooGsOWcRtbom&c=ZwtLrNbtiT1mCfsFxXYIuan7QCObLk3ODcko5z5Oy4PX6CipzJgXCw==&ch=rv_JOru-0Gd4N4j_Hjd5cTbt0BT9oyrdJzb0Vfaj3zA6fVy6rPOppw==)

****
Friend,
We need to talk about the state of the country.
Right now, radical Democrats are more energized than ever. With Nancy Pelosi leading their way, Democrats are headed into the New Year with their most dangerous agenda yet: rigging our electoral maps in their favor and keeping control of Congress for at least the next _**10 years.**_
That's right. If we don't step up and rush in reinforcements NOW, we're looking at another DECADE of their Socialist agenda.

name: Michelle Steel
subject: We made history on Sunday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
Just a few days ago, we made history. I was sworn in as one of the first Korean American women to serve in Congress. But as you know, %%First Name%%, it was not an easy road and one we couldn't have won without you.
****

.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P_eeLYAw5qWSdTPvOZDoNaA95cCf805hRG76itVJBZEqJEB9Usw29zB1YfbZKKo1qHTAXozk9F8bvBCrmLl59nO4kxX3Zyz-5liOHH1ZtGYsZD5iAk8YBvcW2vC4zm2UTf9HelEGjlk7Yumayyku8Y5rziTzVv0O9i2kYV8z9ZTAk6hBF6stzpm--Mjq1dMMxd_aBvdz4r5jesFSeYO5LRB0-3NrbjQFP2hg4YvlJFf-Z2XAXOhHrmV5xUzwRVoBuiLaCOq2uoLe-WQcjKiVAaj0Z8sVCetrGktbtduO9fgxObjtQloV0FaKqiLHk6E8BabQIx_F2WwyE0th0CliY5QjUdJCrOCNuZcO7XzsQsVioMltPi7XHsv6fPcM2XfbGwoP35U-LBeQDiy-Aqz0Fs88v4RDgce1u5ptJgcmTiM=&c=ChBQURf_8DgzsJ8Gpq61LP-l_8Im5Gq6npBnsBVT99F6u3Ck7wK74g==&ch=YTZB6-3_fnBRZzIlt_9gtw-tOe7Shbcu6L61YLU44OecEafl-n9uyA==)
Just a few days ago, we made history. I was sworn in as one of the first Korean American women to serve in Congress. But as you know, it was not an easy road and one we couldn't have won without you:

I was an immigrant and came to this country speaking English as my third language.

My single-mother was harassed by a government agency and unfairly taxed -- inspiring my life of public service and fight for lower, fewer taxes. I took on that very same government agency and returned over $400 million dollars to taxpayers.

We faced one of the closest and toughest races in the nation. The Democrats spent $11+ million attacking us, millions distorting my record and internationally misleading voters, and outspent us 3:1. They spent more dark money against us than any other race in the nation...

And now our opponent -- the one we defeated just a few short months ago -- is back with a vengeance. He's determined to buy this seat out from under us using Pelosi's deep pockets and whatever means necessary.[**I need your help to fight back.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P_eeLYAw5qWSdTPvOZDoNaA95cCf805hRG76itVJBZEqJEB9Usw29xW2GCMkwgXSm5WsVhivOgguuvQU0Sh1B3JJRD2qF9LM9lud7QBHdPT4G7uquGDT_NoEBTIrzZZMfD0RwzwjaxHJDvA2uWCY1_d9eqmEnGLUCPh5Ja6vUzZRtUZ2mUCnynZYTWvmrxaS17Bek7j6EjlwThXBLV9YySJSgiBD1X9UWBn_QQ0oUgZKUsTarIValu7vJtDVQ-U404XF6Re0DFr-ckkrAeVhiTfX4ItVHa2YQM9ZZLjECSGMBATEVoBcaDNUELkDj738ZZDTo1BOP_680XzNX_xANnLgkDDrlNz1KTeaMQBpmYKGG9LrUX2hT5WstXC7oOuHsIjp_xbrzfk8cDMCHDm-qvwK3qto8Ao4c9B6foEmiPU=&c=ChBQURf_8DgzsJ8Gpq61LP-l_8Im5Gq6npBnsBVT99F6u3Ck7wK74g==&ch=YTZB6-3_fnBRZzIlt_9gtw-tOe7Shbcu6L61YLU44OecEafl-n9uyA==)

I need your help to fight for the American Dream, to give all Americans the same opportunity I had all those years ago. We're fighting to keep more of your hard-earned money in your wallets, reducing business crushing regulations, creating jobs, and getting our nation back on its feet. [**But we can 't do it alone.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P_eeLYAw5qWSdTPvOZDoNaA95cCf805hRG76itVJBZEqJEB9Usw29xW2GCMkwgXSm5WsVhivOgguuvQU0Sh1B3JJRD2qF9LM9lud7QBHdPT4G7uquGDT_NoEBTIrzZZMfD0RwzwjaxHJDvA2uWCY1_d9eqmEnGLUCPh5Ja6vUzZRtUZ2mUCnynZYTWvmrxaS17Bek7j6EjlwThXBLV9YySJSgiBD1X9UWBn_QQ0oUgZKUsTarIValu7vJtDVQ-U404XF6Re0DFr-ckkrAeVhiTfX4ItVHa2YQM9ZZLjECSGMBATEVoBcaDNUELkDj738ZZDTo1BOP_680XzNX_xANnLgkDDrlNz1KTeaMQBpmYKGG9LrUX2hT5WstXC7oOuHsIjp_xbrzfk8cDMCHDm-qvwK3qto8Ao4c9B6foEmiPU=&c=ChBQURf_8DgzsJ8Gpq61LP-l_8Im5Gq6npBnsBVT99F6u3Ck7wK74g==&ch=YTZB6-3_fnBRZzIlt_9gtw-tOe7Shbcu6L61YLU44OecEafl-n9uyA==)

This seat remains a top-target. With our opponent back for a rematch, it's guaranteed to be one of the nation's most-watched and most-important races. Because Nancy Pelosi's Majority is hanging on by a thread, and the future of the House Majority hinges on this seat.

[**But with the support of grassroots conservatives like you, I know we can win again. **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P_eeLYAw5qWSdTPvOZDoNaA95cCf805hRG76itVJBZEqJEB9Usw29xW2GCMkwgXSm5WsVhivOgguuvQU0Sh1B3JJRD2qF9LM9lud7QBHdPT4G7uquGDT_NoEBTIrzZZMfD0RwzwjaxHJDvA2uWCY1_d9eqmEnGLUCPh5Ja6vUzZRtUZ2mUCnynZYTWvmrxaS17Bek7j6EjlwThXBLV9YySJSgiBD1X9UWBn_QQ0oUgZKUsTarIValu7vJtDVQ-U404XF6Re0DFr-ckkrAeVhiTfX4ItVHa2YQM9ZZLjECSGMBATEVoBcaDNUELkDj738ZZDTo1BOP_680XzNX_xANnLgkDDrlNz1KTeaMQBpmYKGG9LrUX2hT5WstXC7oOuHsIjp_xbrzfk8cDMCHDm-qvwK3qto8Ao4c9B6foEmiPU=&c=ChBQURf_8DgzsJ8Gpq61LP-l_8Im5Gq6npBnsBVT99F6u3Ck7wK74g==&ch=YTZB6-3_fnBRZzIlt_9gtw-tOe7Shbcu6L61YLU44OecEafl-n9uyA==)

Thank you,

Michelle Steel

clean_body: Just a few days ago, we made history. I was sworn in as one of the first Korean American women to serve in Congress. But as you know, %%First Name%%, it was not an easy road and one we couldn't have won without you. ** . == Just a few days ago, we made history. I was sworn in as one of the first Korean American women to serve in Congress. But as you know, it was not an easy road and one we couldn't have won without you: I was an immigrant and came to this country speaking English as my third language. My single-mother was harassed by a government agency and unfairly taxed -- inspiring my life of public service and fight for lower, fewer taxes. I took on that very same government agency and returned over $400 million dollars to taxpayers. We faced one of the closest and toughest races in the nation. The Democrats spent $11+ million attacking us, millions distorting my record and internationally misleading voters, and outspent us 3:1. They spent more dark money against us than any other race in the nation... And now our opponent -- the one we defeated just a few short months ago -- is back with a vengeance. He's determined to buy this seat out from under us using Pelosi's deep pockets and whatever means necessary.== I need your help to fight for the American Dream, to give all Americans the same opportunity I had all those years ago. We're fighting to keep more of your hard-earned money in your wallets, reducing business crushing regulations, creating jobs, and getting our nation back on its feet. == This seat remains a top-target. With our opponent back for a rematch, it's guaranteed to be one of the nation's most-watched and most-important races. Because Nancy Pelosi's Majority is hanging on by a thread, and the future of the House Majority hinges on this seat. == Thank you, Michelle Steel == | ==** == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

body:
**TIME POLLS CLOSE IN GEORGIA**

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qGNRYWx3cGEbx_dx-DM6K4G5Zc8DucH8_emSMaEyuJ3MvnC_YsOvIrEUssHS2zald71qwYYYqWj28aEyxY7U2uN1o1YnTxw4gh7rAIq4vCyyaoSh6eshqaeN4UzogGv-GQ2Z5N53liiYduIlNp0P7nTgUsZPp2ieztf019DtucShzkGqEY68_PQfqT75W4rpJKn8aAR9yI42aLMS_85Pr0UOxQyfPmTVvdZhS3kLoUeO89UqZYZJdudAXvgZXGmLV-7tnYc8mR_P5gEvpKqIYJr5DlH0YsIB6t1sQOueSPH8CDH5VMu3T9lJUjSkzouab4B0fCsKEbRq8ZZDNXexcxy0wmPeYmacHwh6DrMrDwQTO_Y1Cg1Pp9Pneu0HtP2E0O8J7hsKzn98iL4aIorZk6b7608Rj43YlIRPCve7hDfEkIpQ76VHDCASvR_ssi1E&c=u79S6JSJRxZx-7HOQpt9PinOfgHyp2jKVVciv1rur_dUs8zW-T9NEg==&ch=uJX3RhmdMOfmijhko48bTnUxKAtujrOtB3oqYL93XEFbgCi_0tn96A==)
---
Friend,

Votes are being cast in Georgia RIGHT NOW! We're reaching out to our Top Grassroots Supporters for final push because you know what's on the line.

**[**RUSH A FINAL 7X-MATCHED DONATION NOW**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qGNRYWx3cGEbx_dx-DM6K4G5Zc8DucH8_emSMaEyuJ3MvnC_YsOvIrEUssHS2zald71qwYYYqWj28aEyxY7U2uN1o1YnTxw4gh7rAIq4vCyyaoSh6eshqaeN4UzogGv-GQ2Z5N53liiYduIlNp0P7nTgUsZPp2ieztf019DtucShzkGqEY68_PQfqT75W4rpJKn8aAR9yI42aLMS_85Pr0UOxQyfPmTVvdZhS3kLoUeO89UqZYZJdudAXvgZXGmLV-7tnYc8mR_P5gEvpKqIYJr5DlH0YsIB6t1sQOueSPH8CDH5VMu3T9lJUjSkzouab4B0fCsKEbRq8ZZDNXexcxy0wmPeYmacHwh6DrMrDwQTO_Y1Cg1Pp9Pneu0HtP2E0O8J7hsKzn98iL4aIorZk6b7608Rj43YlIRPCve7hDfEkIpQ76VHDCASvR_ssi1E&c=u79S6JSJRxZx-7HOQpt9PinOfgHyp2jKVVciv1rur_dUs8zW-T9NEg==&ch=uJX3RhmdMOfmijhko48bTnUxKAtujrOtB3oqYL93XEFbgCi_0tn96A==)**
---
**

name: Tim Scott
subject: Failure isn’t an option
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
I have faced adversity in my life. As the son of a single mother from North Charleston, South Carolina, I struggled to get through school and my dreams of a college football career were shattered by a car wreck..
Friend,

I have faced adversity in my life.

As the son of a single mother from North Charleston, South Carolina, I struggled to get through school and my dreams of a college football career were shattered by a car wreck.

But thanks to my mother and a few mentors along the way, I learned that failure isn't failure unless you quit. I realized that even though I faced adversity, I was blessed to be born in a country where I could still make a difference in the world.

Kids like me aren't supposed to grow up to run a successful small business. They aren't supposed to become best-selling authors.

**And kids like me aren 't supposed to be the first African American elected to both the U.S. House and the U.S. Senate since Reconstruction.**

I am truly blessed to be spending each and every day fighting for those conservative principles I learned growing up through adversity.

Too many young people today are falling for socialist ideas that discourage hard work and innovation. We must continue to promote and fight for the same conservative values that have made America the greatest country on earth.

[**Will you chip in $10, $25, $50 or even $100 to help us spread the word about the power of conservatism?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sYbTG9s-y8FpVTqbDvqVWE0zoVl61fx_AokzL4p79K1p_Whm9H-P8Ay30G0JjaauCfMfofh5cbfK8Uik47rJdsoKJRVEcPoBVVw7xyRnRh7wMgrr9qy_5_YrWRW2UZq35DSgLOB6nrsXHiIEn40UEiyGHSrE9tZknZS4pMrM9DtU97iljUo-GlBl3RSxqAtv1GuLsb_0BXoAhlRlTljnLT9KWxSb0l88fUMjCm2CES7kelpvu_zLvpNaKZmWWs46Qvt2cO1hTM9u-YuNaNcT9a4n-iHJOCjfTFI1s26Bp9uoA3Rav3cJWTDP-vsRZIub4gY1cDqzwq-QH_1keYuPbBnF1LN8SUksLdrtuiCiMnWZLPiPT4u00Qa6FnGqdshCI_vph28rSkLPFWz2deeKaM8GlP8MEh7o&c=frWC07DVyAscmXNo7jh01fx9Caxh7u4S880ETWktUyh6-4iFVyzMuw==&ch=xhwOzqylrCKE-_5cb_4lJaOSQdoY7oO-EjTlUMC33_CRwR4aFdKJFA==)

Friend, it is easy to get discouraged as we see these socialist ideas become prevalent in the media and our society.

Young people today need to understand that it's hard work and perseverance, not a government handout, that will get you ahead in life.

That is my story, [**will you help me share it?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sYbTG9s-y8FpVTqbDvqVWE0zoVl61fx_AokzL4p79K1p_Whm9H-P8Ay30G0JjaauCfMfofh5cbfK8Uik47rJdsoKJRVEcPoBVVw7xyRnRh7wMgrr9qy_5_YrWRW2UZq35DSgLOB6nrsXHiIEn40UEiyGHSrE9tZknZS4pMrM9DtU97iljUo-GlBl3RSxqAtv1GuLsb_0BXoAhlRlTljnLT9KWxSb0l88fUMjCm2CES7kelpvu_zLvpNaKZmWWs46Qvt2cO1hTM9u-YuNaNcT9a4n-iHJOCjfTFI1s26Bp9uoA3Rav3cJWTDP-vsRZIub4gY1cDqzwq-QH_1keYuPbBnF1LN8SUksLdrtuiCiMnWZLPiPT4u00Qa6FnGqdshCI_vph28rSkLPFWz2deeKaM8GlP8MEh7o&c=frWC07DVyAscmXNo7jh01fx9Caxh7u4S880ETWktUyh6-4iFVyzMuw==&ch=xhwOzqylrCKE-_5cb_4lJaOSQdoY7oO-EjTlUMC33_CRwR4aFdKJFA==)

[**A donation of $10, $25, $50 or even $100 will help us spread the word about the power of conservatism.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sYbTG9s-y8FpVTqbDvqVWE0zoVl61fx_AokzL4p79K1p_Whm9H-P8Ay30G0JjaauCfMfofh5cbfK8Uik47rJdsoKJRVEcPoBVVw7xyRnRh7wMgrr9qy_5_YrWRW2UZq35DSgLOB6nrsXHiIEn40UEiyGHSrE9tZknZS4pMrM9DtU97iljUo-GlBl3RSxqAtv1GuLsb_0BXoAhlRlTljnLT9KWxSb0l88fUMjCm2CES7kelpvu_zLvpNaKZmWWs46Qvt2cO1hTM9u-YuNaNcT9a4n-iHJOCjfTFI1s26Bp9uoA3Rav3cJWTDP-vsRZIub4gY1cDqzwq-QH_1keYuPbBnF1LN8SUksLdrtuiCiMnWZLPiPT4u00Qa6FnGqdshCI_vph28rSkLPFWz2deeKaM8GlP8MEh7o&c=frWC07DVyAscmXNo7jh01fx9Caxh7u4S880ETWktUyh6-4iFVyzMuw==&ch=xhwOzqylrCKE-_5cb_4lJaOSQdoY7oO-EjTlUMC33_CRwR4aFdKJFA==)

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: Joint Statement From The Loeffler And Perdue Campaigns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, JANUARY 5, 2020
Joint Statement From The Loeffler And Perdue Campaigns ATLANTA, GA - Today, the Loeffler and Perdue campaigns issued the following joint statement:
"We are encouraged by reports of high voter turnout across the state - particularly so in North Georgia, where President Trump rallied Republicans last night. But make no mistake about it: this is going to a very close election and could come down to the difference of just a few votes in a few precincts across the state.
We continue to encourage every Georgian to get out and vote and call, text, and email their friends, family, and neighbors to do the same. This generational election will be decided by the votes cast in the next few hours - no one should be sitting on the sidelines. Go Vote!"
---
| ### Stephen Lawson Deputy Campaign Manager [stephen@kellyforsenate.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qLaDmMBz02g6qcJP7XITo8pREEbNYYEsIHFIZcP7a5FbovnzHmJMRN3rKQT6iiaZWNkFqYNhPHKx2wCiugM5IueG6ojN1vOjYLolGgTqikRP1X6DIvvpXXtuIO_Dh7U9U9EP6usJNDaRhQ22RAZBhGfus_QqTQse&c=cJyd1eSumWqT-ZCvIhCqTdR85N3oTopyWZLBSKNQ9WYbGIkhMAFWrQ==&ch=3ZstcZO2NGHM1IfGC7HiJb78i4gWtpLJrpqefOoqeU-6rHx0G-tdkg==)

name: Melissa Hortman
subject: Here we go
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/KCUkbEig5ds-DL16ZA8aA5TcoNaiCsxd9kulxXImcVg=/UUlYeRRhKVyFOEfOOwHmxKMptx1dzOV1fJV02xZQr2I=?refcode=010521)
| | Friend, Today, we kicked off the 2021 legislative session. 70 members were sworn in as our most diverse caucus ever and I had the honor of being reelected as Speaker for the Minnesota House of Representatives. When we last gathered for the start of the legislative session things were much different. Today strikes a more somber note. Our state and our country have experienced so much loss. However, as COVID-19 continues to threaten our families and communities, we need to continue to focus on recovery. We need to make sure everyone is able to weather what we hope are the last few months of this pandemic and thrive beyond it. Remaining the only divided legislature in the country is no easy task, but working together, we can build a better future for everyone. Thank you, **Melissa Hortman ** Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives [**P.S. The Political Contribution Refund Program has been renewed for 2021. Make your refundable donation of $50 (or $100 per couple) today.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/KCUkbEig5ds-DL16ZA8aA5TcoNaiCsxd9kulxXImcVg=/UUlYeRRhKVyFOEfOOwHmxKMptx1dzOV1fJV02xZQr2I=?refcode=010521) [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/KCUkbEig5ds-DL16ZA8aA5TcoNaiCsxd9kulxXImcVg=/UUlYeRRhKVyFOEfOOwHmxKMptx1dzOV1fJV02xZQr2I=?refcode=010521)

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Our Right to Carry
body:
Fighting for the Second Amendment
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012h4Gb-fqqJ5cROVPve2bfIxHVTztunbplwArED_-JfNM7cg3e-9AzIk0qAt0adOig1mNQU6MGBYRKTQNBfUPz5VwQhlS-RX9s-jIXmS-2Zm67npF21ZgLTmNCKC1MIG81qb_F2kBe21X8pRuhkmDJT_vmjpLyv-72StnG5B1nkTKdrqsz7Rcag==&c=VJua8AvJSvW2art36sFJPlnGGvFoiEF1cGNxgM3tj4DraZkF5r8DBA==&ch=7TDC6UM8LTCh5G9CQelPITjTFImaPND0YjTVIxkBx_NTUXug6ZDdkQ==)
---
| Patriot,
I am a proud advocate for our Second Amendment rights. I carry because I believe in our right to protect ourselves, our families, and our communities.
Less than a week ago, myself and 82 other members of Congress signed a letter to Speaker Pelosi in efforts to BLOCK Democrats' proposed gun grab.
Now, we've won!
The liberals in Washington, D.C. tried to infringe on our rights by setting into place a provision in the rules package prohibiting members of Congress from possessing firearms on Capitol grounds.
As a woman and wife working in one of the most dangerous cities in the country, carrying my gun can mean the difference between life and death, especially in the political environment we all live in today. Like me, many other Congress members have to rely on themselves for protection, and now is not the time to take those protections away.
This is why we fought, and now brought a HUGE victory for all Americans. We are ready to defend the Constitution and protect the rights of the American people.
Giving liberals power over the lives of a few can lead to surrendering the lives of many. Their efforts to infringe with the Second Amendment rights of Congress members was just the beginning.
I will not allow ANYONE to infringe on the rights of ANY American.
---
| | | [DONATE TO HELP KAT KEEP FIGHTING](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012h4Gb-fqqJ5cROVPve2bfIxHVTztunbplwArED_-JfNM7cg3e-9AzIk0qAt0adOig1mNQU6MGBYRKTQNBfUPz5VwQhlS-RX9s-jIXmS-2Zm67npF21ZgLTmNCKC1MIG81qb_F2kBe21X8pRuhkmDJT_vmjpLyv-72StnG5B1nkTKdrqsz7Rcag==&c=VJua8AvJSvW2art36sFJPlnGGvFoiEF1cGNxgM3tj4DraZkF5r8DBA==&ch=7TDC6UM8LTCh5G9CQelPITjTFImaPND0YjTVIxkBx_NTUXug6ZDdkQ==)
---
| Together, we will ensure our rights are protected!
For America,
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012h4Gb-fqqJ5cROVPve2bfIxHVTztunbplwArED_-JfNM7cg3e-9AzIk0qAt0adOig1mNQU6MGBYRKTQNBfUPz5VwQhlS-RX9s-jIXmS-2Zm67npF21ZgLTmNCKC1MIG81qb_F2kBe21X8pRuhkmDJT_vmjpLyv-72StnG5B1nkTKdrqsz7Rcag==&c=VJua8AvJSvW2art36sFJPlnGGvFoiEF1cGNxgM3tj4DraZkF5r8DBA==&ch=7TDC6UM8LTCh5G9CQelPITjTFImaPND0YjTVIxkBx_NTUXug6ZDdkQ==)
---
| Kat Cammack

body:
It isn't too late to help preserve our Republican majority in the U.S. Senate! Click or tap >>

Hoosier Republican,

There was a lot at stake in 2020's general election, but control of the U.S. Senate is on the line in today's Georgia runoff elections.

Senators Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue need your help. With just hours left, they are pushing their final Get-Out-The-Vote efforts to Georgians across their state, and need your help.

I don't know if you've seen the news, but both of their races are TIGHT. Will you rush a critical GOTV contribution? (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-georgia-final?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG_INGOP_E_GeorgiaLastChance_010520&mc_cid=3d06e4b939&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) Even $5 will help them reach the voters they need to emerge victorious.
Rush Critical Georgia GOTV Contribution Now! (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-georgia-final?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG_INGOP_E_GeorgiaLastChance_010520&mc_cid=3d06e4b939&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
I know you've probably received a lot of emails on these two races. That's because control of the U.S. Senate completely hinges on their outcomes.

That's why we're asking you to stand with Georgia's Republicans and rush a critical GOTV contribution right now (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-georgia-final?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG_INGOP_E_GeorgiaLastChance_010520&mc_cid=3d06e4b939&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

The future of our country depends on victory, Hoosier Republican. We need to leave it all on the field.

- Team Indiana GOP

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Polls close at 7pm!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa300/34a064cc/1d787536/7027928/3431615519/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - Election Day is flying by! But don't worry, you still have time to get to the polls and cast your ballot. **Polls close at 7pm, but if you are IN LINE BEFORE 7pm, you WILL be allowed to vote.** Don't miss this opportunity to make your voice heard. **If you are voting in person today, remember to vote at your assigned Election Day polling place.** Your Election Day polling place likely differs from your early voting location options, so double check your Election Day polling place at [iwillvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa300/34a064cc/1d787536/7027929/3431615519/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/") or call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816. And before you head to the polls, remember to grab [an acceptable form of identification](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa300/34a064cc/1d787536/7027936/3431615519/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://sos.ga.gov/index.php/elections/georgia_voter_identification_requirements2"). **Requested a ballot but haven 't received it?** You can vote in person today! Go to [iwillvote.co](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa300/34a064cc/1d787536/7027929/3431615519/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/")m to find your assigned polling place. When you arrive at the polls, just tell the person at the check-in table that you wish to cancel your requested mail ballot and vote in person instead. **Already received your mail ballot but haven 't returned it? **Return it to a drop box in your county or to your county elections office NOW. **Mail ballots must be in a drop box or received by your county elections office BEFORE 7PM TODAY!** Follow the instructions on your mail ballot and complete it, then sign the oath on the back of the envelope. When you're done, check [iwillvote.com/locate](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa300/34a064cc/1d787536/7027937/3431615519/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/locate") to find a drop box location in your county (most counties have them). You can also return your ballot directly to your county elections office. Remember, return your ballot directly; DO NOT put it in the mail. Once you return your mail ballot, go to [georgia.ballottrax.net/voter](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa300/34a064cc/1d787536/7027934/3431615519/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://georgia.ballottrax.net/voter/") to make sure your ballot is received! If you have questions or need help, contact the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816. You can find more information about voting in Georgia at [peachvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa300/34a064cc/1d787536/7027935/3431615519/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.peachvote.com/"). And when it's all said and done and your ballot has been cast, [share your voting experience with us](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa300/34a064cc/1d787536/7027932/3431615519/VEsO/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSesRsAhJ9dBbyXI-sWwQJ2MiLWM3co9vyXSzCK0aMvvxBVu8g/viewform")! Fair Fight is documenting voters' stories to help in our fight for free and fair elections. Happy Election Day, Georgia! \- Team Fair Fight |
---|---|---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa300/34a064cc/1d787536/7027933/3431615519/VEsP/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa300/34a064cc/1d787536/7027930/3431615519/VEsHBQ/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa300/34a064cc/1d787536/7027931/3431615519/VEsHBA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

1270 Caroline Street
Suite D120-311
Atlanta, GA 30307

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Vaccine update
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
I wanted to give you an update on the current status of our vaccination efforts. Already, we have administered second doses to the first 400 people to be vaccinated in Rhode Island. As of this morning, we have administered 26,163 doses of the vaccine in Rhode Island.
While our Department of Health is working hard to distribute vaccines, we are limited by our supply. Right now, we're receiving 14,000 doses each week - enough for just over 1% of our population. Other states are in the same boat. Still, we're making good progress. The increase in supply over time as manufacturers ramp up and more vaccines are approved gives us confidence that we'll be able to put COVID-19 behind us over the next few months. Of course, that will only happen if we continue wearing masks, keeping our distance, and following all the public health guidance.
---
|
---
| You can take a look at this chart for information about who's getting the vaccine this week. Please, stay patient and stay cautious as we work to limit spread as much as possible in this last stretch of the pandemic. If you are eligible to get vaccinated, please do so - but remember, you will need two doses for it to be effective. If we all keep working together and following the rules, we can guarantee a much better year in 2021.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qaXL_qT4bUKZIJHyUGYSui1hueUZvr3l5FAlWxLVeNADYn-uaubZfihtRh43Qt72K398ac1r1pWS__BpeYeWLvV2ljcOU49d68v6YhNH4r0VI00VpERBlEoiPSXPeNnHqgl1iimD9d3VnXaTH015_uBC4zWrWc_7tC-4V_u1IWQlN-9tur8xKXoeI4aWgNSSccPObE474UQs7kSCu3_k55HaQYjt3cxwg5xrIRF0_-QBF-9w7tFPGaxg0eyo4OurUw97MOvMOP11uLrq9GbuAeT2MwCVF-7EG3kye_3U1B6SUJN0VyuUTw4b-WnnuvP3DBIrXSDDdko=&c=3XBC4pXzKsmw_r1Ci7CrK_R4VJwCf7ppoVp79wRNdO_MjNqEZYcqyQ==&ch=9CnwSvcooC2zXR2xoZt5wge15nkbz8-3KrLjz5Xo9fksNIMqpqe0wg==).
---
|
---

I am fighting for election integrity and President Trump. Stand with me by rushing a contribution. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1d44fbb05dd9/i-need-your-help-940198?e=e4728463fc)

## Patriot,

I'm proudly announcing _I will OBJECT to the counting electoral votes in disputed states _tomorrow. You sent me to Congress to fight for President Trump and election integrity and that's exactly what I'm doing.
---
| [RUSH A SECURE DONATION >>](https://nehlsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f1efeb71566d5b848c6535fb5&id=c4b2260ea1&e=e4728463fc "RUSH A SECURE DONATION >>")

|

All folks want is a review of this election to ensure there was sufficient election integrity, but Democrats REFUSE.

**That is why I must OBJECT to counting electoral votes from disputed states. We owe it to you, the American people, to investigate and ensure election integrity.**

_**Rush a contribution to help me FIGHT for President Trump and election integrity.**_
---

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Democrats CROSSED a Dangerous Line Today
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_vote_message&n=1)
---
Peter \-- I'm so mad that I'm shaking as I write this. You'll have to excuse me since the issue of unchecked, unilateral executive powers by one person makes me fight like a mad dog! **Democrat Leaders CROSSED A DANGEROUS LINE today. They completely ignored the Rules of the Minnesota House in order to avoid hearing the Resolution to End Walz' Emergency Powers.** But thankfully Rep Erik Mortenson, on his first day in office, challenged the Democrats and made a motion to bring forward the Resolution. He believes what we all believe: there's no more important issue in Minnesota right now than Ending Walz' Emergency Powers. A veteran legislator told Mort back in November that he should just be quiet and learn the process for the first two years. Thankfully Mort didn't listen to that swamp dweller! Democrat leadership saw how effective your calls and emails were. They had a crisis on their hands last night. Which is precisely why they decided to ignore Mortensen's Resolution and motion today which violates the Rules of the House. How do they expect us to peacefully participate in the political process if they just throw out the rules?! **So Mort made a bold move in his first speech in the Legislature and challenged Democrat leadership in front of all Minnesota. And when ruled out of order, he and others didn't quit!** WATCH HERE TO SEE HOW THE FLOOR SESSION WENT DOWN (INCLUDES OUR COMMENTARY): [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=JgIBoJDRsS4q5gIGXkALncqGFAfcScFEwHoHcviy-4Q&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_vote_message&n=2) As you can see, Mort's motion was ruled out of order by the Speaker of the House. So Republicans quickly moved to challenge the ruling of the Speaker. If overruled, we would've got a clean vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers. But it turns out that Reps Ecklund, Lislegard, Marquart, Pelowski, Sandstede and Sundin are all a bunch of FRAUDS! When their vote actually mattered to End Walz' Emergency Powers, they voted against their voters and their constituents. **Now comes the time for our pressure campaign. We will make sure every voter in their districts knows how their legislator is voting. And we have lined up digital ads, print ads, call campaigns and much more. Legislators like Sandstede, who won by only 50 votes in November, have two options: vote the right way and End Walz' Emergency Powers or start to see the pain from our massive pressure campaign.** And I mean it. We've been building resources for this fight and we know **[YOU will keep helping us out](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_vote_message&n=3)** until we finally win and End Walz' Emergency Powers once and for all. It's going to be incredibly painful for Ecklund, Lislegard, Marquart, Pelowski, Sandstede and Sundin if they want to put Governor Walz' powers ahead of the needs of their constituents. **Democrat leaders will continue to do everything they can to avoid an actual vote by using parliamentary procedures. Including changing the House Rules to require a 60% threshold to bring the vote to the Floor. We'll hold Ecklund, Lislegard, Marquart, Pelowski, Sandstede and Sundin personally accountable if this passes.** We also now know that a water-downed, Fake End Walz' Powers bill is being drafted with help from Republican Rep Barb Haley. Democrat leadership stated this bill will likely get a vote in a couple weeks. This also MUST be opposed You see why the team at Action 4 Liberty has to work around the clock in this fight? They are pulling every trick in the book. I have to ask you for some help. We're on the goal line now; we're so close. Help us by doing one of two things. Support our pressure campaign by volunteering to make phone calls or by helping with a donation so we can hire more callers, buy more ads, and ratchet up the pressure.
## [YES, I want to Volunteer](https://www.action4liberty.com/volunteer_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_vote_message&n=4)
## [I don't have the time, but would like to donate](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_vote_message&n=5)
We still need YOUR help to finish this off. We owe it to Larvita, Jane, Jeremiah, Lisa and all the other businesses who are under assault by Governor Walz. Let's have their back and End Walz' Emergency Powers once and for all. These legislators can't outrun us forever. This will be up for a vote again soon. And as long as you help fund our pressure campaign or volunteer your time, we can assure you these legislators will feel the pain! [Please help put the pressure on these cowardly, fraudulent Democrats with a donation of $100. If that's too steep, $50 or $25 can go along way to holding them accountable. Want to help even more, consider a one time donation of $500. We need you on board!](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_vote_message&n=6) **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_vote_message&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_vote_message&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_vote_message&n=9), software for leaders.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Muthoni=20Wambu=20Kraal?=
subject: RE: Join DNC Chair, Tom Perez for two important sessions...
body:
| | | |
---
| | | **Dear Friends-** **Polls will be closing in a couple of hours in Georgia and Virginia! I know that your attention is focused on these important races. But I wanted to remind you that DNC Chair Tom Perez has extended an invitation to participate in two important upcoming events. First a Democratic Data Debrief this Thursday, January 7 from 2:00pm - 4:00pm ET/ 11:00am - 1:00pm PT. Please see below information from the Chair to RSVP for the event. ** **Second, we want to look back on how our efforts to combat disinformation fared, and hold an open dialogue about how we might build upon that foundation for future years. name: GOP Alerts
subject: Hold Pelosi DemocratsAccountable
body:
Chris Pappas and Ann Kuster have let down Granite Staters

| |
---
Derek,
We're just a few days into 2021 and the Democrats in D.C. have already let us down.
Earlier this week Congressman Chris Pappas and Congresswoman Ann Kuster **BOTH** voted to give Nancy Pelosi control of the Speaker's gavel for another two years.
We shouldn't be surprised - Pappas and Kuster have voted with Pelosi **100% of the time** and these next two years won't be anything different.
While Democrats like Pappas and Kuster try to get ahead by taking their marching orders from Nancy Pelosi, Granite Staters are being left behind.

clean_body: Chris Pappas and Ann Kuster have let down Granite Staters | | Derek, We're just a few days into 2021 and the Democrats in D.C. have already let us down. Earlier this week Congressman Chris Pappas and Congresswoman Ann Kuster BOTH voted to give Nancy Pelosi control of the Speaker's gavel for another two years. We shouldn't be surprised - Pappas and Kuster have voted with Pelosi 100% of the time and these next two years won't be anything different. While Democrats like Pappas and Kuster try to get ahead by taking their marching orders from Nancy Pelosi, Granite Staters are being left behind. Nancy Pelosi admittedly delayed COVID-19 relief talks for MONTHS before the election in order to damage President Trump and the Republicans. Playing politics with COVID funding shouldn't be rewarded with a re-election as Speaker, but both Pappas and Kuster felt Pelosi deserved another term. Enough is enough \- with 2022 in our sights, we need to make sure we have the resources to defeat Chris Pappas and Ann Kuster and send Republicans down to D.C. to fight for New Hampshire. We can't allow Pappas, Kuster, and Pelosi to get away with their political games while the Granite State is at a disadvantage. The NHGOP made historic gains at the state level in 2020, but 2022 is the year we restore Republican leadership from New Hampshire in our nation's capital. | New Hampshire Republican State Committee 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301 |

If you are IN LINE at your polling place by 7pm, you MUST be allowed to vote. Stay in line until you have cast your ballot! For more information on voting in Georgia, go to [peachvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa303/34a064cc/1d7acd9d/70279f5/2039224606/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.peachvote.com/"). If you have questions, call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816.
